Send us a message
Tell us about your brand and goals — we'll get back to you within the hour.
Your info is private and will never be shared. Ever.

For general enquiries, fill out the form. Or if you know your project details — book a free 30-min call for a more refined, step-by-step process.

FAQ

Questions we hear a lot

How much does it cost to work with ScratchBox?+

We have three plans starting from ₹29,999/month, and for anything custom, we scope it together on a call. Book a free 30-min call to get started with no obligation.

How long does a typical project take?+

Timelines vary by project type. A brand identity takes 3–5 weeks, a website 4–8 weeks, and an ongoing social media retainer is monthly.

Do you work with early-stage startups?+

Absolutely — startups are our sweet spot. We've helped businesses go from zero brand presence to market-ready in weeks.

Can you handle everything from strategy to execution?+

Yes. One team for strategy, design, content, development, and marketing. No handoffs, no starting the brief from scratch every time you need something new.

What does the free consultation include?+

A genuine 30-min strategy session — not a sales call. We'll review your situation, discuss goals, and share ideas. You'll leave with value regardless of whether we work together.

Prefer to chat directly?

WhatsApp us ↗ We respond within the hour
﻿

Not your typical agency. We partner through strategy, creative, and everything in between.
